title: From The Darkness
description: This is a horror mod pack that focuses on adventure.
body:
This is a horror mod-pack that focuses on providing adventures for you and your friends. This mod-pack contains over 80 mods and provides an experience in a more modded vanilla gameplay. Many adventures are waiting for mod-lovers to try out. This mod-pack is valid on version 1.19.2 of Minecraft. This Mod pack contains secuirty Mods to Help you perotect your house further from the darkness.

Mods within this pack:
_Sons of Sins: Wounds of Chaos_

_Tenebrous Lands_

_The End of Herobrine_

_The Knocker_

_The Man From The Fog_

_The Midnight Lurker_

_The One Who Watches_

_The Silence_

_True Darkness_

_Underground Villages_

_Underground Bunkers_

_Man From Hell_

_Nyctophobia_

_Nyf's Spiders_

_SCP Fallen Foundation_

_Sanity: Descent Into Madness_

_SecurityCraft_

_YUNG's Better Mineshafts (Nether Fortresses,Ocean Monuments,ect...)_


**And Much More Fun Suprises **
